ABOUT CLOUD NATIVE & OSS TLV

Cloud Native & OSS IL

Cloud Native and Open Source TLV is the community that started its journey as the OpenStack Israel Community as early as 2014, and has been running since then. Over the years it evolved and expanded to include all of the awesome cloud and open source technology our community loves to learn about and build together. Find all of our previous event videos and pics below.
